headline: GTA VI poised for one of gaming's biggest launches ever
summary: Wedbush Securities Managing Director of Strategic Planning Michael Pachter joins Market Domination to discuss the surging pre-order demand for Take-Two Interactive Software's (TTWO) Grand Theft Auto VI and why the highly anticipated title is on track to become one of the biggest video game launches in history.

headline: Will Gaming Expansion Help Microsoft Anchor the Cloud Reach?
summary: MSFT's gaming revenues fall as Xbox hardware slumps, but cloud streaming, Game Pass and new content may deepen ties to its cloud ecosystem.

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Take-Two Interactive, Raises Price Target to $285
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Brian Pitz   maintains Take-Two Interactive (NASDAQ:TTWO) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $280 to $285.

headline: TTWO Stock Climbs After GTA 6 Preorders Go Live – Retail Fans Debate Discless Physical Edition
summary: Preorders for physical and digital copies of GTA 6 went live at midnight on June 25, which is priced at $79.99 for the base edition and $99.99 for the “Ultimate” edition.

headline: Take-Two Interactive: More Than A Grand Theft Auto VI Story
summary: Take-Two's business is strengthening ahead of Grand Theft Auto VI, with EBITDA expanding and the balance sheet improving. Read why I assign TTWO stock a Buy.
